calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Continued To Aug-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lauren Gibbs, Esq. 213-344-2418 Levin Migdal & Gibbs LLP for Plaintiff.
Lindsey Romano, Esq. 415-632-8186 Gordon Rees for Defendant.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, calendar-la@veritext.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Ms. Romano presents arguments. Court comments and poses questions. Ms. Gibbs responds.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant TEAM Risk Management Strategies, LLC's demurrer to Plaintiff Heather Yarborough's complaint.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, calendar-la@veritext.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
